name: Purple Wojak
description: Purple Wojak ($PURK) is a Solana-based meme token created to represent participation in the “purple movement” that has emerged within the meme coin ecosystem. The project draws inspiration from the Wojak meme format and purple-themed meme culture, combining these elements into a community-focused digital asset. Purple Wojak is designed as a cultural and social token rather than a technical protocol or financial product. The primary purpose of Purple Wojak is to support meme-driven interaction, online expression, and community engagement within crypto-related social environments. The token does not provide staking features, yield generation, governance rights, or claims on external assets, nor does it function as a stablecoin, wrapped asset, or derivative instrument. All token activity occurs on-chain through publicly verifiable smart contracts on the Solana network. Purple Wojak was launched by developers with prior involvement in the Purple Pepe development team, a relationship that can be independently observed through on-chain wallet activity. The project emphasizes transparency, open access, and organic community development without making claims regarding financial performance, investment returns, or future outcomes.
